papers.title_en: FineCombo-TTS: Collaborative and Precise Controllable Speech Synthesis Using Text Descriptions and Reference Speech
papers.authors: Shuoyi Zhou, Yixuan Zhou, Peiji Yang, Yifan Hu, Yicheng Zhong, Zhisheng Wang, Zhiyong Wu
papers.evidence: 基于文本描述和参考语音的精细可控语音合成
papers.tldr: 现有可控TTS方法基于参考语音或文本描述各有限制，联合方法耦合松散。本文提出FineCombo-TTS统一框架，联合参考语音和文本描述，通过学习统一声学表示并引入条件流匹配的语音变异预测器，实现细粒度变换。构建FineEdit结构化配对数据集支持相对属性控制。实验表明该方法能灵活、精确且富有表现力地控制语音合成。
papers.abstract_en: Controllable text-to-speech (TTS) has become a key research focus. However, methods based on either reference speech or text descriptions lack flexibility and precise control, and recent joint approaches remain loosely coupled, with speech modeling timbre and text controlling global style. We propose FineCombo-TTS, a unified framework for speech synthesis grounded in reference speech and guided by text descriptions, enabling flexible and precise control over acoustic attributes. Instead of explicit attribute disentanglement, we learn a unified acoustic representation and introduce a Conditional Flow Matching (CFM)-based Speech Variance Predictor to model fine-grained reference-to-target transformations guided by text descriptions. To support relative attribute control, we construct FineEdit, a structured paired dataset that explicitly encodes source-to-target attribute variations. Experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves flexible, precise, and expressive controllable TTS.

papers.title_en: A Comparative Study of Pretrained Transformer Models for Quranic ASR: Speech Representations, Label Formats, and Dataset Composition
papers.authors: Nabil Mosharraf Hossain, Riasat Islam, Unaizah Obaidellah
papers.evidence: 使用预训练Transformer的古兰经语音识别，面向低资源语言
papers.tldr: 古兰经自动语音识别（ASR）面临高词错误率和语料覆盖不全的问题。本研究对Wav2Vec2.0、HuBERT和XLS-R三种预训练Transformer模型进行领域微调，使用超过870小时的专业及用户朗诵音频。通过消融实验发现，无变音符阿拉伯文本标签效果最佳，Wav2Vec2-XLSR-53提供最强语音表示。最优模型在EveryAyah子集上WER仅0.08，联合设置0.11，相比基线Citrinet提升约5个百分点，且训练时间从140小时降至40小时。该工作为古兰经ASR提供高效方案，并为后续音素感知模型研究奠定基础。
papers.abstract_en: Quran Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) aims to convert Quranic recitation into text, enabling applications such as aided memorisation tools and Quranic search engines. However, existing ASR models often exhibit high Word Error Rates (WER) on user-recited verses and lack full coverage of the Quranic corpus. This paper presents a systematic empirical study of domain-specific fine-tuning of pretrained Transformer-based models for Quranic ASR, using advanced speech feature extraction methods: Wav2Vec2.0, HuBERT, and XLS-R. These models apply self-supervised learning by masking portions of input audio and using Transformer architectures to learn context-aware speech features. The pretrained models are fine-tuned on a filtered Quranic dataset exceeding 870 hours of professional and user recitations. Through comprehensive ablation studies across feature extractors, output label formats, training strategies, and clip durations, we identify the key factors that affect transcription accuracy in this domain. Our best-performing configuration achieves a WER of 0.08 on the EveryAyah subset and 0.11 on the combined EveryAyah+Tarteel setting, representing roughly a five-percentage-point gain over the Citrinet baseline (WER = 0.163) while reducing combined-model training time from 140 hours to 40 hours. Arabic text without diacritics yields the best fine-tuning results, and Wav2Vec2-XLSR-53 provides the strongest overall representation. Future work includes improving dataset quality and developing phoneme-aware models to extract deeper speech feature representations for Tajweed-sensitive applications.

papers.title_en: Exploring Pre-training Benefits on Phoneme Addition through Fine-tuning in Speech Synthesis
papers.authors: Masato Murata, Koichi Miyazaki, Tomoki Koriyama, Tomoki Toda
papers.evidence: 低资源文本转语音迁移学习
papers.tldr: 在低资源语音合成中，当目标语料包含预训练未见音素时，模型需通过微调进行“音素增加”。研究通过LLM生成音素控制语料的模拟实验和英语到日语的跨语言真实语音实验，发现微调相比从头训练虽能提升自然度，但在新音素的音素错误率上需要相同甚至更多数据才能达到可比性能。结果表明预训练主要改善自然度，对音素增加帮助有限。
papers.abstract_en: Transfer learning is widely used for low-resource text-to-speech. When the target corpus contains phonemes unseen in pre-training, the model must expand its phoneme inventory during fine-tuning; we call the process "phoneme addition." However, it remains unclear whether the pre-trained ability to generate seen phonemes contributes to this process. This study investigates phoneme addition in two settings: (1) a simulation setup using LLM-generated phoneme-controlled corpora that enables investigation without considering confounding factors, and (2) a real-speech cross-lingual transfer setup (English to Japanese) to validate whether the findings hold in practice. Experiments in both settings showed that while fine-tuning achieved higher naturalness than training from scratch, it required as much or more data to achieve comparable PER for new phonemes. These results indicate that pre-training mainly contributes to naturalness improvement, but offers limited benefit for phoneme addition.

papers.title_en: Leveraging Audio-LLMs to Filter Speech-to-Speech Training Data
papers.authors: Qixu Chen, Satoshi Nakamura
papers.evidence: 利用音频大语言模型过滤语音翻译数据，保持跨语言语义一致性
papers.tldr: 大规模语音翻译数据存在噪声、错位和语义错误，影响模型性能。本文提出Rank-to-Distill两阶段策略：先训练轻量排序器生成伪标签，再训练音频大语言模型直接从语音对预测保留/丢弃。该方法联合建模音频保真度和跨语言语义一致性。在CVSS-C和SpeechMatrix上，过滤后端到端S2ST提升高达+1.4 ASR-BLEU。无需人工标注即可有效过滤数据，提升翻译鲁棒性。
papers.abstract_en: Large-scale mined corpora provide abundant training data for end-to-end speech-to-speech translation (S2ST) but may contain noise, misalignment, and semantic errors. Filtering noisy data is crucial to maintain robust speech translation performance. We study how to train an audio-language model to make keep/drop decisions on paired speech directly from audio. To obtain reliable supervision without manual labels, we adopt a scalable two-stage Rank-to-Distill strategy. A lightweight ranker generates keep/drop pseudo-labels from noisy speech pairs, then trains an audio large language model to predict keep/drop directly from raw paired speech. The resulting model jointly captures acoustic fidelity and cross-lingual semantic consistency for the selection of speech-conditioned data. Experiments on CVSS-C and SpeechMatrix show consistent improvements over unfiltered training, yielding up to +1.4 ASR-BLEU for end-to-end S2ST.

papers.title_en: Zero-VC: Zero-Lookahead Streaming Voice Conversion via Speaker Anonymization
papers.authors: Yudong Li, Zihao Fang, Junwen Qiu, Ruihai Jing, Ruixiang Hang, Yingda Shen, Zhizheng Wu
papers.evidence: 流式语音转换与说话人匿名化
papers.tldr: 流式零样本语音转换面临音色与语言内容解缠难题，现有信息瓶颈方法丢弃韵律导致需显式注入基频特征而增加前瞻延迟，说话人扰动方法则忽略音色泄露与效用保留的权衡。本文发现说话人匿名化（SA）的目标天然契合平衡这两者，因此将其作为新型扰动机制，通过鲁棒表示减少生成器对未来上下文的依赖，实现严格因果的零前瞻网络Zero-VC。实验表明，该方法在不牺牲音质和韵律自然度的前提下，有效降低音色泄露，并避免了算法前瞻延迟，为低延迟流式语音转换提供了高效方案。
papers.abstract_en: Streaming zero-shot voice conversion struggles to disentangle timbre from linguistic content without degrading utility or inflating latency. Current methods rely on information bottleneck (IB) or speaker perturbation. While IB filters out timbre, it discards prosody, forcing models to explicitly inject features like fundamental frequency. This often requires buffering future frames, creating algorithmic lookahead latency. On the other hand, existing perturbation methods largely overlook the crucial trade-off between timbre leakage and utility preservation. Recognizing this neglected trade-off, we find that the inherent objective of Speaker Anonymization (SA) aligns well with balancing these factors. Thus, we introduce SA as a novel perturbation mechanism to explicitly mitigate timbre leakage while retaining prosodic utility. Crucially, SA's robust representations significantly alleviate the generator's reliance on future context, enabling our strictly causal, zero-lookahead network. Audio samples are available at https://amphionteam.github.io/Zero-VC-demo/.

papers.title_en: Transcript-Free Flow-Matching Text-to-Speech via Speech Feature Conditioning
papers.authors: SooHwan Eom, Hee Suk Yoon, Eunseop Yoon, Mark Hasegawa-Johnson, Chang D. Yoo
papers.evidence: 面向低资源场景（口吃/口音语音）的TTS
papers.tldr: 现有流匹配TTS模型如F5-TTS依赖外部ASR生成的参考文本，导致对带口音或构音障碍语音的零样本合成效果脆弱，且文本条件会传播非典型声学模式。本文提出RTFree-F5，使用自监督语音特征替代参考文本，通过轻量适配器映射到文本条件空间，无需转录即可进行条件生成。在构音障碍语音上，该方法将WER从24.6%降至10.4%，超越真实文本基线，同时保持自然度和标准基准竞争力。
papers.abstract_en: Recent flow-matching text-to-speech (TTS) models, such as F5-TTS, rely on a reference transcript at inference time, obtained from an external ASR system. This dependency makes zero-shot TTS brittle for accented or dysarthric speakers, precisely the scenarios where it is most needed. Moreover, we find that text-based reference conditioning can propagate atypical acoustic patterns from atypical speech into synthesis, even when ground-truth transcripts are available. To address this, we propose RTFree-F5, which replaces the reference transcript with continuous self-supervised speech representations mapped into F5-TTS's text-conditioning space via a lightweight adapter, while reusing the pretrained checkpoint. On dysarthric speech, RTFree-F5 reduces WER from 24.6% to 10.4%, surpassing even the ground-truth reference transcript baselines, while improving naturalness and remaining competitive on standard benchmarks without requiring any reference transcript.

papers.title_en: Ontology Memory-Augmented ASR Correction for Long Text-Speech Interleaved Conversations
papers.authors: Xinxin Li, Huiyao Chen, Meishan Zhang, Yunxin Li, Zulong Chen, Zhibo Ren, Xiaoqing Dong Baotian Hu, Min Zhang
papers.evidence: 面向长文本-语音交错对话的本体记忆增强ASR纠正
papers.tldr: 针对长文本-语音交错对话中ASR纠错依赖上下文证据的难题，现有方法拼接历史导致噪声。本文提出本体记忆增强框架，将交互历史组织为可动态更新的本体记忆，存储实体、术语、变体及语义关系作为可检索节点。在RAMC-Corr数据集上，该方法在9/10配对骨干设置中优于直接纠错，并促进了更选择性、证据基础的纠错。该工作为长程对话ASR纠错提供了有效上下文利用方案。
papers.abstract_en: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) correction has traditionally focused on isolated utterances or short local contexts. However, as text and speech become increasingly interleaved in long interactions, ASR correction requires conversation-level contextual evidence. Existing ASR correction methods often rely on the current hypothesis or concatenate raw dialogue history. In such contexts, sparse correction evidence can be difficult to locate amid redundancy and noise. Addressing these challenges, we propose an ontology memory-augmented ASR correction framework for long text-speech interleaved conversations. The framework organizes preceding interaction history into a dynamically updatable ontology memory, where entities, terminology, surface variants, potential ASR confusions, and semantic relations are stored as retrievable nodes for context-grounded correction. To evaluate this setting, we construct RAMC-Corr, a dataset derived from MAGIC-RAMC for long-range ASR correction with grounded context. Experiments on RAMC-Corr show that our method improves over direct correction in 9 out of 10 paired backbone-setting combinations and encourages more selective and evidence-grounded corrections for context-dependent ASR errors.

papers.title_en: A Practical Evaluation Method for Long-Form Simultaneous Speech-to-Speech Translation
papers.authors: Yulin Xue, Siqi Ouyang, Lei Li
papers.evidence: 同传语音翻译评估方法
papers.tldr: 现有同步语音翻译评估主要针对短语音或预分割输入，缺乏长语音连续场景的实用方法。本文提出一种新方法：对生成的目标语音进行ASR和强制对齐恢复词级时间戳，利用句子嵌入对齐器匹配源句子，从而计算句级延迟和翻译质量指标。实验表明该方法有效，并揭示当前系统在长语音上存在显著的延迟累积问题。该工作为长输入SimulS2ST评估提供了可复现的基准。
papers.abstract_en: Simultaneous speech-to-speech translation (SimulS2ST) enables real-time cross-lingual communication, but existing evaluation has focused largely on short or pre-segmented speech rather than long-form, continuous input. Prior approaches are difficult to reproduce and make assumptions that do not hold for end-to-end systems. We present a practical evaluation method for long-form SimulS2ST. Given source speech, pre-segmented source transcripts, and reference translations, we run automatic speech recognition (ASR) and forced alignment on the generated target speech to recover token-level timestamps, then apply a sentence-embedding-based aligner to match the target text to its corresponding source sentences. This enables sentence-level computation of latency and quality metrics, including YAAL and xCOMET, which are then aggregated into final system-level scores. Experiments on representative SimulS2ST systems show that the method is effective in practice and reveal that current systems suffer from substantial latency accumulation on long speech.

papers.title_en: MambAdapter: Lightweight Mamba-Based Adapters for Parameter-Efficient Transfer Learning in Speech and Audio
papers.authors: Salman Hussain Ali, Umberto Cappellazzo, Mirco Ravanelli
papers.evidence: 语音和音频的参数高效迁移学习方法，可应用于多语言TTS和ASR
papers.tldr: 为降低Transformer微调成本，提出MambAdapter，将状态空间模型Mamba嵌入低秩瓶颈适配器，通过参数共享与轻量Mamba模块增强音频特征建模。在音频分类和语音识别任务中，以更少参数达到或超越强基线方法，验证了状态空间模型在参数高效迁移学习中的有效性。
papers.abstract_en: Fine-tuning Transformer-based foundation models has become the dominant strategy for domain adaptation in audio and speech processing. To reduce the computational and memory costs of this process, parameter-efficient transfer learning (PETL) methods have been widely explored. Meanwhile, Mamba, a recent state-space model, has emerged as a promising alternative to Transformers for sequence modeling. In this work, we present MambAdapter, a parameter-efficient transfer learning approach that integrates Mamba into low-rank bottleneck adapters. Our design combines parameter sharing across adapters with the injection of a lightweight Mamba module, enabling more effective modeling of audio features. We demonstrate that MambAdapter matches or outperforms strong PETL baselines on four audio classification tasks and five speech recognition languages, even when operating under reduced parameter budgets.

papers.title_en: Joycent: Diffusion-based Accent TTS without Accented Phone Prediction
papers.authors: Xintong Wang, Ye Wang
papers.evidence: 基于扩散的口音语音合成，直接与跨语言合成相关
papers.tldr: 现有口音TTS系统依赖两阶段流水线，先预测口音音素再合成，存在错误累积和配对数据稀缺问题，且文本表示难以建模韵律。为此提出Joycent，一种基于扩散模型的口音TTS，直接从标准音素序列和语音参考合成口音语音，无需预测口音音素。方法通过条件层归一化集成口音和说话人表示，并引入WhisAID口音识别模型提取表征。实验表明，Joycent在提升口音自然度的同时保持了说话人身份，避免了传统流水线的局限。
papers.abstract_en: Accent text-to-speech (TTS) aims to synthesize speech with target accents. Existing accent TTS systems typically rely on a two-stage pipeline that first converts standard phone sequences into accented phone sequences and then synthesizes accented speech. However, such approaches suffer from error accumulation and require paired standard-accented phone sequence data, which is often limited in practice. Moreover, text-based accented phone representations are insufficient to model acoustic accent characteristics such as prosody and rhythm. In this work, we propose Joycent, a diffusion-based accent TTS model that synthesizes accented speech directly from standard phone sequences and speech references without accented phone prediction. Joycent integrates accent and speaker representations through conditional layer normalization (CLN) in the text encoder. We introduce WhisAID, a Mandarin accent identification model trained on accented Mandarin speech to extract accent representations. Experimental results show that Joycent improves accentedness while preserving speaker identity compared with baseline systems. We release our code and demos at: https://github.com/oshindow/Joycent-code.

papers.title_en: Robust Spoofed Speech Detection via Temporal Pyramid Modeling
papers.authors: Mahtab Masoudi Nezhad, Nima Karimian
papers.evidence: 利用时间金字塔的多尺度伪造语音检测，在多语言数据集评估
papers.tldr: 欺骗语音检测面临真实合成、语音转换和重放攻击的挑战，跨数据集泛化是主要瓶颈。本文提出时域金字塔适配器，通过并行不同感受野的时间卷积捕获从局部伪影到全局韵律异常的多尺度欺骗线索，并集成自监督XLS-R表示。在PartialSpoof数据集上，模型达到99.24% AUC和3.87% EER，显著优于LCNN-BLSTM和TRACE等现有方法。多语言评估表明，欺骗伪影与语言无关，但域和语言迁移时性能下降，凸显了适应与校准策略的重要性。
papers.abstract_en: Spoofed speech detection is increasingly challenged by realistic synthesis, voice conversion, and replay attacks, with cross-dataset generalization remaining a major limitation. This work we propose a Temporal Pyramid Adapter that utilize parallel temporal convolutions with varying receptive fields to capture multi-scale spoofing cues, ranging from local artifacts to global prosodic irregularities. We also integrated self-supervised XLS-R representations combined with front-end adapters, including Mel, Sinc, and a Temporal Pyramid design for multi-scale temporal modeling. The proposed model is evaluated cross multiple benchmark including ASVspoof 2017, ASVspoof 2021 (DF/LA), PartialSpoof, DiffSSD, and multilingual HQ-MPSD datasets. Experimental results demonstrate that Temporal Pyramid model obtained AUC of 99.24% and a EER of 3.87% on the PartialSpoof database, which is significantly outperforming the base model and several SOTA baseline such as LCNN-BLSTM (9.87% EER) and TRACE (8.08% EER). Additionally, multilingual evaluations confirm that while spoofing artifact are independent from language. While self-supervised representations improve robustness, performance degrades under domain and language shifts, highlighting the need for better adaptation and calibration strategies.

papers.title_en: Not Truly Multilingual: Script Consistency as a Missing Dimension in VLM Evaluation
papers.authors: Prabhjot Singh, Bhushan Pawar, Madhu Reddiboina, Rajvee Sheth
papers.evidence: 多脚本VLM评估基准，与非拉丁文字评估相关
papers.tldr: 当前多语言视觉语言模型评估假设语言与文字一一对应，忽略了旁遮普语等使用多种文字的语言。我们构建了PuMVR基准，包含1000个严格并行的图像-文本实例，覆盖旁遮普语的Gurmukhi、Shahmukhi和罗马三种文字。评估10个模型发现显著文字差距：相同视觉任务因文字不同准确率差高达16%，跨文字上下文迁移脆弱。为此提出Script Consistency Rate指标，最低仅24.8%，呼吁将文字无关性作为评估标准以确保公平AI。
papers.abstract_en: Current multilingual evaluations for Vision-Language Models (VLMs) assume a one-to-one mapping between language and orthography, overlooking billions of users of multi-script languages. We introduce PuMVR (Punjabi Multimodal Visual Reasoning), a benchmark of 1,000 strictly parallel image-text instances across Punjabi's three active scripts: Gurmukhi, Shahmukhi, and Roman. Evaluating 10 state-of-the-art VLMs, we expose a substantial and systematic Script Gap. Models frequently solve visual tasks in one script while failing identical tasks in another, with accuracy deltas reaching 16%. Crucially, visual input boosts absolute performance uniformly yet does not close the orthographic gap. Furthermore, cross-script in-context transfer is highly brittle, exposing script-locked knowledge representation. Supported by McNemar tests across all script pairs, our findings demonstrate that current "multilingual" VLMs are not truly multi-script. We propose the Script Consistency Rate (SCR), which falls as low as 24.8% on our benchmark, as a mandatory metric for script-agnostic evaluation to ensure equitable AI access. Data and code are available at: https://github.com/prabhjotschugh/Not-Truly-Multilingual-PuMVR.

papers.title_en: DASH: Dual-View Self-Distillation with Multi-Layer Hidden Representations for Robust Speech Recognition
papers.authors: Jaeeun Baik, Ui-Hyeop Shin, Jiwoon Lee, Woocheol Jeong, Hyung-Min Park
papers.evidence: 通过自蒸馏实现鲁棒自动语音识别
papers.tldr: 真实世界噪声环境导致自动语音识别性能大幅下降，现有噪声增强微调方法常引入鲁棒性与清洁环境性能的权衡，且易过拟合特定噪声类型。对此，本文提出DASH自蒸馏框架，利用双视图（清洁与噪声）学习一致性，从多个编码器层蒸馏隐藏表示以捕获从底层声学到高层语义的特征，并通过最小化原型分配分布的KL散度稳定训练过程。在LibriSpeech数据集上的实验表明，DASH在多种噪声条件下均能一致提升识别准确率，同时完全保持清洁环境下的原有性能。其关键贡献在于通过仅增加约4%微调时间的无标签预训练阶段，即可显著增强鲁棒性，避免了传统方法的性能权衡与过拟合问题。
papers.abstract_en: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) often degrades in real-world noisy environments, making noise robustness essential for deployment. Supervised noise-augmented fine-tuning is a common remedy, but it can introduce a robustness-clean trade-off and overfit to specific corruptions, degrading recognition in clean conditions. We propose DASH, a self-distillation framework that improves robustness by learning clean--noisy consistency from paired views. DASH distills hidden representations from multiple encoder layers to capture features from low-level acoustics to high-level semantics, and stabilizes training by minimizing KL divergence between prototype assignment distributions of clean and noisy views. Experiments on LibriSpeech show that DASH consistently improves recognition under diverse noisy conditions while preserving clean accuracy, achieved by a label-free pre-training stage with minimal additional overhead (about 4% of fine-tuning time) beyond standard fine-tuning.

papers.title_en: Analyzing Language and Geographical Variation in Speech Representations Across 60 Indic Languages
papers.authors: Pavan Kumar J, Agneedh Basu, Pranav Bhat, Sujith Pulikodan, Visruth Sanka, Nihar Desai, Prasanta Kumar Ghosh
papers.evidence: 分析60种印度语言中语音表示的语言和地理变异
papers.tldr: 自监督语音编码器通常只使用语言标签微调，忽略了地理变异。本文在60种印度语言上，对比语言-地区联合监督（386类）与仅语言监督的微调效果。采用Whisper-base和Wav2Vec2.0-base，通过分类任务和归一化条件互信息分析嵌入结构。结果表明，联合监督在保持语言分类能力的同时，增强了地区判别性，并形成全局语言簇内与地区变异对应的子簇结构。
papers.abstract_en: Self-supervised speech encoders are often fine-tuned with language supervision, which can overlook geographical variation. To understand the learned representations under joint supervision of language and district compared to language-only supervision, we fine-tune Whisper-base and Wav2Vec2.0-base for classification tasks with joint language-district (386 classes) and language-only classification (60 languages). The language-district supervision improves district discrimination conditioned on language in the embedding space while strong marginal language classification. We analyze the structure of the learned embeddings using Normalized Conditional Mutual Information (NCMI), showing that language-district supervision produces global language clusters with structured within language subclusters aligned to district variation, enhancing geographical separability without degrading language-level organization.

papers.title_en: PASQA: Pitch-Accent-Focused Speech Quality Assessment Model Trained on Synthetic Speech with Accent Errors
papers.authors: Masaya Kawamura, Yuma Shirahata, Kentaro Mitsui, Reo Shimizu
papers.evidence: 针对音调重音的语音质量评估，使用可控重音的TTS生成训练数据
papers.tldr: 针对现有平均意见得分预测模型对日语重音局部错误不敏感且无法区分严重程度的问题，本文提出PASQA模型。其利用重音可控文本转语音系统合成不同错误率的数据，并基于重音错误率计算伪重音质量分数作为监督信号。模型以自监督表征为基础，通过莫拉条件融合模块对齐声学与音素信息，结合排序损失、辅助重音错误定位任务和说话者不变训练，实现精准的重音正确性排序。实验表明，PASQA在已知和未知说话人上排序准确率显著优于传统模型，且与人类重音正确性判断高度一致。该工作填补了面向重音正确性的细粒度语音质量评估的空白，为属性定向评估提供了有效范式。
papers.abstract_en: Existing mean opinion score (MOS) prediction models typically predict utterance-level naturalness MOS and can be insensitive to localized pitch-accent errors. We propose Pitch-Accent-focused Speech Quality Assessment (PASQA), which explicitly targets pitch-accent correctness. To train our model, we construct a controlled Japanese accent-error dataset by changing accent patterns using an accent-controllable text-to-speech system, and compute a pseudo accent-quality score from the accent-error rate. PASQA builds on self-supervised representations and employs mora-conditioned fusion, ranking loss, an auxiliary accent-error localization task, and speaker-invariant training. Experiments show that conventional models fail to preserve the ordering by accent-error severity, whereas PASQA achieves high ordering accuracy on both seen and unseen speakers. Further, PASQA shows stronger agreement with human accent-correctness judgments. The code is available at https://github.com/lycorp-jp/PASQA.

papers.title_en: Emo-LiPO: Listwise Preference Optimization for Fine-Grained Emotion Intensity Control in LLM-based Text-to-Speech
papers.authors: Yihang Lin, Li Zhou, Congwei Cao, Dongchu Xie, Xiaoxue Gao, Chen Zhang, Haizhou Li
papers.evidence: LLM-TTS中的可控情感强度
papers.tldr: 基于大语言模型的文本转语音系统在细粒度情感强度控制上存在语义-声学鸿沟。本文将其转化为学习排序问题，提出Emo-LiPO框架，通过列表式偏好优化对齐文本中的相对情感强度，并构建多说话人数据集ESD-plus。实验表明，Emo-LiPO在情感准确性和强度可控性上显著优于监督和DPO基线，尤其在高强度区域。
papers.abstract_en: Large language model (LLM)-based text-to-speech (TTS) systems enable prompt-conditioned emotional control but struggle with fine-grained emotion intensity due to the semantic -- acoustic gap between text and speech. To address this challenge, we formulate emotion intensity control in LLM-based TTS as a learning-to-rank problem and propose Emo-LiPO, a listwise preference optimization framework that aligns prompt-conditioned speech generation with relative emotion intensity expressed in text. Emo-LiPO explicitly models global intensity ordering within each emotion under fixed transcripts, enabling more faithful and continuous emotional expression. We further construct ESD-plus, a multi-speaker dataset with explicit emotion intensity variations, to support fine-grained emotion modeling and evaluation. Experiments on ESD-plus demonstrate that Emo-LiPO significantly improves emotion accuracy and intensity controllability over both supervised- and DPO-based LLM TTS baselines, with particularly pronounced gains at high intensity levels.

papers.title_en: MiniPIC: Flexible Position-Independent Caching in <100LOC
papers.authors: Nathan Ordonez, Thomas Parnell
papers.evidence: 提出位置无关缓存以加速RAG推理，适用于少样本场景
papers.tldr: 检索增强和智能体工作负载反复预填充文档等结构化输入，但前缀缓存因要求相同前缀而无法重用。MiniPIC通过无位置编码的KV缓存（存储未旋转K向量，运行时应用RoPE）和用户控制原语（块对齐填充、跨度分隔符、提示依赖）实现位置无关缓存，仅修改100行核心引擎代码。在2WikiMultihopQA上，预填充吞吐量提升49%，缓存跨度TTFT降低两个数量级，未缓存跨度保持线性缩放，最坏开销仅5.7%。该设计以极小代价实现多种PIC方法并原生集成KV缓存卸载，具有实用价值。
papers.abstract_en: Retrieval-augmented and agentic workloads repeatedly prefill recurring predictable structured inputs (which we call "spans") such as documents and code files. Yet, prefix caching in engines such as vLLM cannot reuse their KV entries unless they share identical prefixes with another request, while Position-Independent Caching (PIC) implementations within production-grade inference servers typically either require substantial server code changes or keep KV state outside the server, incurring host-to-device transfer overhead. We present Minimalistic PIC (MiniPIC): a minimal, flexible and fast vLLM design built from two ingredients: positional-encoding-free KV cache and user-controlled cache-reuse primitives. MiniPIC stores unrotated K vectors in the KV cache, applies RoPE to K tiles inside attention using per-request logical positions, and exposes three user-facing and token-level primitives: block-aligned padding, span separator (SSep), and prompt depend (PDep), that modify hashing behavior and effective block-level causal attention structure. With fewer than 100 lines of core-engine changes plus a custom attention backend, these primitives are sufficient to realize multiple PIC methods, including Block-Attention, EPIC, and Prompt Cache, within the same running vLLM instance, while natively integrating with KV cache CPU offload implementations. On 2WikiMultihopQA, MiniPIC with interleaved scheduling improves prefill throughput by 49% over baseline vLLM, reduces cached-span time-to-first-token by up to two orders of magnitude, preserves the linear prefill scaling of uncached spans, and incurs only 5.7% worst-case overhead.

papers.title_en: Code-Switching Reveals Language Anchoring in Multilingual LLMs
papers.authors: Jeonghyun Park, Seunghyun Yoon, Yonghyun Jun, Hwanhee Lee
papers.evidence: 代码切换揭示多语言LLM中的语言锚定偏差
papers.tldr: 多语言大模型在处理代码切换输入时性能显著下降，其内部表示机制尚不明确。本文通过引入Anchor Bias量化语言锚定，发现语法框架效应：源语言框架的代码切换保持源锚定，目标框架则偏向目标且QA下降更大。基于此提出CANVAS推理时干预方法，通过软引导隐藏状态恢复QA F1。该工作揭示了内部锚定信号可用于缓解代码切换推理失败。
papers.abstract_en: Multilingual Large Language Models (MLLMs) are increasingly expected to handle Code-Switched (CS) inputs, yet mixing languages frequently degrades performance relative to source- or target-language monolingual counterparts. To understand this degradation, we use grammar-forced CS as a controlled diagnostic setting for locating CS representations relative to their source and target counterparts. We introduce Anchor Bias, a geometric measure that quantifies language anchoring, whether a CS hidden state aligns closer to its source or target language counterpart. Across diverse MLLMs, Anchor Bias reveals a consistent grammar-frame effect: source-framed CS stays source-anchored, whereas target-framed CS shifts target-ward and shows larger Question Answering (QA) degradation. Motivated by this representational pattern, we propose CANVAS (Contextual Anchor-based Neural Vector Alignment Steering), an inference-time intervention that extracts a source-side canvas from the input and softly steers target-language hidden states toward the source anchor during prefill. CANVAS consistently recovers QA F1 across MLLMs and CS conditions, showing that internal anchoring signals provide an actionable target for mitigating CS inference failures.

papers.title_en: Repurposing a Speech Classifier for Guided Diffusion-Based Speech Generation
papers.authors: Rostislav Makarov, Timo Gerkmann
papers.evidence: 利用分类器引导的扩散模型进行语音生成
papers.tldr: 分类器引导扩散生成通常需要单独训练分类器和扩散模型，计算开销大。本文提出将传统语音分类器重新用作扩散生成的主干，仅附加轻量子网络并训练，在单一模型中实现了高质量条件语音生成。该方法在降低内存和计算成本的同时，保持了高语音质量，为判别与生成模型的融合提供了新途径。
papers.abstract_en: Classifier guidance is a way to control diffusion generation by using a noise-conditioned classifier to steer the sampling process toward a target class. One drawback of classifier guidance is that it requires two separately trained models: a classifier and a diffusion model. We therefore study a more compact alternative in which a conventionally trained speech classifier is repurposed as the backbone for diffusion generation. Starting from a frozen noise-conditioned classifier in log-Mel space, we attach a lightweight subnetwork that reuses intermediate classifier representations and train only this subnetwork under a Denoising Score Matching objective. Our work shows that a pretrained classifier can be repurposed for conditional generation, providing an appealing bridge between discriminative modeling and conditional speech synthesis resulting in high speech quality within a single-backbone model, with reduced memory footprint and computational cost.

papers.title_en: FlowEdit: Associative Memory for Lifelong Pronunciation Adaptation in Flow-Matching TTS
papers.authors: Harshit Singh, Ayush Pratap Singh, Nityanand Mathur
papers.evidence: 流匹配TTS的终身发音适应
papers.tldr: 流匹配TTS在零样本合成中表现优异，但部署后无法纠正专有名词发音错误。FlowEdit在冻结模型上通过文本嵌入空间的词级扰动学习发音修正，并存储在关联记忆网络中。推理时通过软注意力检索实现模糊形态匹配。在18语系312个专有名词上，音素错误率降低92.7%，且不损一般语音质量。
papers.abstract_en: Flow-matching text-to-speech systems achieve remarkable zero-shot quality but remain static after deployment: pronunciation errors on out-of-vocabulary proper nouns persist unless the model is retrained. We introduce FlowEdit, a life-long adaptation framework for frozen flow-matching TTS that learns pronunciation corrections as latent conditioning edits rather than weight updates. When corrective feedback is provided, FlowEdit optimizes a token-level perturbation in the text embedding space, then stores the correction in a Modern Hopfield Network serving as content-addressable episodic memory. At inference, corrections are retrieved via soft attention with a similarity gate, enabling fuzzy morphological matching. On our curated benchmark of 312 multilingual proper nouns across 18 language families, FlowEdit reduces target-word Phoneme Error Rate by 92.7% relative to the zero-shot baseline while maintaining identical general-speech quality. Corrections complete in approximately 15 seconds on a single GPU.

papers.title_en: How Do Instructions Shape Speech? Cross-Attention Attribution for Style-Captioned Text-to-Speech
papers.authors: Nityanand Mathur, Hamees Sayed, Wasim Madha, Apoorv Singh, Sameer Khurana, Akshat Mandloi, Sudarshan Kamath
papers.evidence: 风格描述TTS的交叉注意力归因，揭示指令如何塑造语音
papers.tldr: 风格字幕的文本转语音系统通过自然语言控制发音特性，但词级影响机制未知。本文首次将DAAM框架适配到语音扩散模型，提出交叉注意力归因方法，在CapSpeech-TTS上提取25层24步的每token热图。分析3600组(风格字幕,文本)组合发现：风格token时间方差低，其注意力与基频和能量相关；风格影响在早期ODE步骤和深层网络达到峰值，且第17层注意力熵最小，对应网络选择性最强。本研究揭示了自然语言指令如何塑造语音扩散模型的注意力分配，为可解释性TTS提供新工具。
papers.abstract_en: Style-captioned text-to-speech systems use natural language to control voice characteristics, but how individual words influence acoustic output remains unclear. Understanding this is critical for diagnosing failure modes and improving controllability in expressive TTS. We propose cross-attention attribution for speech diffusion models, adapting the DAAM framework to the speech domain for the first time, and apply it to CapSpeech-TTS. Our method extracts per-token heatmaps across 25 layers and 24 ODE steps. We analyze 3,600 (style caption, text transcript) combinations comprising 120 style captions conditioning the generation of 30 text transcripts each, revealing how caption tokens shape waveforms. Results show: (1) style tokens have lower temporal variance than content/function tokens, confirming global conditioning; (2) style attention correlates with F0 and energy; (3) style conditioning peaks in early steps and deep layers; (4) attention entropy reaches its minimum at layer 17, co-occurring with the style importance peak, indicating maximal network selectivity at the most style-critical stage. This is the first study of how natural language influences cross-attention in speech diffusion models
